violations.text: Shredded chicken was observed held past 7 days. PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. The screen in the door is in poor repair and there is a gap on the bottom of the door. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap (currently has air break.) A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Guidance provided. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

Food contact surfaces of the veggie slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was taken out of service until sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024
The ceiling in the bathroom area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
